历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2024 was approximately 2775, and it significantly advanced to about 2035 in 2025, with large fluctuations in recent two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 2035. The provincial science enrollment plan was 66 in 2024, 56 in 2025 (reduction), and 51 in 2026, further reducing by about 8.9% compared to 2025, intensifying competition under the reduction trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 41st in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 40-43 range in recent years, indicating a high university level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving laboratory explosion and fire accidents, which may have a certain negative impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 45th overall), with medium-to-high short video exposure. System Science is A+ (top nationally), Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, with outstanding engineering strength highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended due to social popularity. The total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 238,000, a significant increase from 52,500 in 2025, sharply intensifying competition. Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, which has a certain regional appeal to Xinjiang examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Xinjiang is about 1.5% (2025 data), indicating it is not a key source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend of rankings in 2025, further enrollment reduction in 2026, and a substantial increase in the total number of examinees in the province, intensified competition is the main driving factor. The negative reputation slightly offsets this. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1896, with a range of 1612-2180.

- Computer Science and Technology (Zhixing Innovation Class 101 Plan Top Talent Base Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Automation Class (Intelligent Systems and Intelligent Manufacturing)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range (1612-2180), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a sprint and Tier 3 as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1612), focus on sprinting for the Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class and top Computer Science majors. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>2180), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2024 was approximately 993, moving forward to about 687 in 2025, with a continuous forward shift over the past two years. The 2025 baseline is about 687. The provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 8 in 2024, 8 in 2025, and 10 in 2026 (Section 7), representing a 25% expansion compared to 2025, which is a relatively large increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 41st on the Soft Science main list, indicating a high level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (laboratory explosion and fire accident), but the liberal arts enrollment majors are few, so the impact is limited. Douyin popularity is relatively hot. Management Science and Engineering (A-) is related to liberal arts economics and management. Although the law major does not have an A-class discipline evaluation, its social popularity is relatively hot.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively hot social popularity and is recommended; economics and management categories are divided and require observation. The total number of examinees in this province in 2026 has significantly increased, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend of the 2025 ranking, the 25% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the significant increase in the total number of examinees in this province, the expansion will cause the ranking to move backward, but the increase in examinees will intensify competition. The two factors offset each other, and the ranking is expected to move slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 775, with a range of 659-891.
